domain_archetypes.name: zarna evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: zarna signal changes while value context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: value boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: value handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: proposition regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: proposition behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: associates operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: associates output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
